items.title: SD-014 replay gate: surprise-weighted vs wanting-weighted prioritization (Carey 2019 replication)
items.notes: 3 conditions (A_SURPRISE d=[0,0,0,1], B_WANTING d=[1,0,0,0], C_ABLATION), 3 seeds. D1(100eps)+D2(50eps)+Test(20eps) per condition-seed. Tests Carey 2019 anti-preference replay: SURPRISE_WEIGHTED should select newly-devalued (stale) nodes after D1->D2 revaluation. P1: surprise@start[A]>surprise@start[B]+0.001. P2: wanting@start[B]>wanting@start[A]+0.001. P3: n_surprise_writes_d2>5.
